design_principles: Emotion First: The booking tunnel must feel like a red-carpet experience, not a sterile form.
Contrast & Lighting: Deep blacks rely on subtle gold accents and lighting effects, not flat blocks of color.
Typography as Art: Cormorant Garamond is used extensively for expressive headers.
Negative Space: Lavish spacing gives elements room to breathe, feeling expensive.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#B8922A]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#F5F0E8]

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/60 border-b border-[#F5F0E8]/10
surfaces_and_micro_themes.offer_cards: Flat solid #141414 background, 1px border border-[#B8922A]/30, subtle gold hover glow, inside padding p-8.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Neumorphic/Crisp: background matches parent, sharp 1px border-[#F5F0E8]/10, no heavy shadow.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons_primary: bg-[#B8922A] text-[#0A0A0A] font-semibold tracking-widest uppercase hover:bg-[#D4AF37] transition-all
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons_secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#B8922A] text-[#B8922A] hover:bg-[#B8922A]/10 transition-all

spacing_and_layout.system: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more padding than standard apps.
spacing_and_layout.grid_marketing: Bento Grid (Mode A) for the landing page offers to create asymmetry. 1 hero card spanning 2 columns, others 1 column.
spacing_and_layout.grid_dashboard: Control Room Grid (Mode B) for Manager back-office. Tight gap-6, utilized pixel space.

components.landing_page: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout to maintain creative freedom and asymmetry.
components.booking_tunnel: Heavily customized Shadcn UI (Forms, DatePicker/Calendar, Select, Input) restyled with luxury dark theme variables.
components.dashboard: Shadcn UI (Tables, Tabs, Dialogs) with border-collapse and technical grid look.
components.icons: lucide-react with thin stroke widths to match elegant typography.

media_and_images.strategy: Cinematic, dark and moody visuals with gold lighting. Overlays should be dark to ensure cream text contrast.

hero_background.role: Landing page hero section background. Use bg-black/40 gradient overlay for text readability.

texture_overlay.role: Global background texture mask for dark sections to give an expensive velvet/grain feel. Opacity 5-10%.

offer_pass_day.role: Image for the 'Pass Day' offer card (Aerial pool view).

staff_auth_background.role: Split-screen background for Staff/Admin Login page.

motion_and_interaction.libraries: framer-motion for micro-interactions and smooth page transitions.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Interactive elements must transition color. Buttons get lighter gold. Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1).
motion_and_interaction.scroll_effects: Fade-in up stagger for offer cards and tunnel steps.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast using bg-black/50 or dark gradient overlays. Gold (#B8922A) on Black (#0A0A0A) passes APCA.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: Mandatory on all interactive elements. E.g., data-testid='book-now-button', data-testid='language-toggle-fr'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Cormorant Garamond and Montserrat via Google Fonts.
Implement the FR/EN toggle logic using a simple context or state, default to FR.
Set up Tailwind config with custom colors: primary (#0A0A0A), accent (#B8922A), and cream (#F5F0E8).
Never use generic white backgrounds. Everything must be anchored in the #0A0A0A luxury dark theme.
The booking tunnel should feel like a guided, step-by-step concierge service with smooth transitions between steps.
